title: Pay Up
editorialSummary: Types of tax sorted by the economic base they are levied on. False trail: VAT and sales tax are both consumption taxes but VAT is specifically a value-added mechanism grouped with consumption; estate tax and inheritance tax are related but both belong to wealth taxes. Players must distinguish income, consumption, wealth, and payroll bases.

meta.gptRationale: Tax-type buckets are conceptually straightforward, though a few items vary by jurisdiction and can blur wealth, payroll, and consumption distinctions.
